questionHtml: Using only evidence from the data in Question 1, suggest two strategies for reducing obesity in countries where this health problem is most prevalent.
markschemeHtml:
1. use public education to encourage people to walk more/become more active;
  2. improve city design to improve walkability;
  3. reduce distances between homes / shops / workplaces / parks;
  4. more sidewalks / make it easier for pedestrians to cross roads / other specific measure;

 

Do not accept answers that involve diet as that is beyond the scope of the data given.

meta.title: Using only evidence from the data in Question 1, suggest two strategies for reducing obesity in countries where this health problem is most prevalent.
